privileged_info_summary: The task uses real customer support data from the Kaggle Customer Support Ticket Dataset (chiapudding/kaggle-customer-service on HuggingFace). The dataset contains 8 customer names and email addresses (Marisa Obrien, Jessica Rios, Christopher Robbins, Nicolas Wilson, Tamara Hahn, Christina Dillon, Alexander Carroll, William Dawson) that have been verified to exist in the original CSV file. The setup_task.sh script seeds exactly 5 technical support conversations and 3 billing support conversations using these customer profiles. Two pre-existing mailboxes ('Technical Support' and 'Billing Support') and one pre-existing agent (Sarah Mitchell) are configured in the setup phase. All customer contact information, conversation counts, and pre-existing infrastructure match the metadata claims.
